acceptance_targets: [chapter_14_F001] PASS if, in the revised `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:273-281` span, the ticket appears because of an explicit choice (request, challenge, or deliberate reveal) stated on-page; FAIL if the reveal still depends on incidental tape-search coincidence.

[chapter_14_F002] PASS if the revised `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:113-189` span contains at least 3 paragraphs with explicit Marisol interiority (thought, bodily sensation, memory, or self-assessment) anchored to present action; FAIL if the span remains primarily external choreography.

[chapter_14_F003] PASS if only one of those three loci retains the explicit saint-versus-liar framing and the other two are rewritten as concrete child-context questions (homework/church/bus-ride level, not abstract moral thesis); FAIL if all three still echo the same binary framing.

[chapter_14_F004] PASS if, in `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:239-244`, Carina has at least one full boundary statement delivered while physically still, and if no more than one adjacent dialogue beat in that span is coupled to a chore action; FAIL if boundary talk remains fully chore-coupled.

[chapter_14_F005] PASS if the revised `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:115` equivalent contains complete clauses with explicit subject+verb for each step; FAIL if the line remains a sequence of verbless fragment commands.

[chapter_14_F006] PASS if, across those target loci, no more than two "looked" interpersonal beats remain and replaced beats convey tension through non-gaze action/sound/tactile detail; FAIL if the same gaze formula still appears at three or more loci.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if, in the revised `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:273-281` span, the ticket appears because of an explicit choice (request, challenge, or deliberate reveal) stated on-page; FAIL if the reveal still depends on incidental tape-search coincidence.
findings.problem: The chapter's key reveal (the pawn ticket) is triggered by accidental drawer rummaging rather than a character-driven decision, which weakens causal pressure at the exact turning point.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework the discovery beat so agency drives it: either Carina deliberately produces the ticket or Marisol intentionally asks to see rehab-payment records before opening the drawer. Target `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:273` through `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:281` and keep the same downstream reveal content.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:113-189` span contains at least 3 paragraphs with explicit Marisol interiority (thought, bodily sensation, memory, or self-assessment) anchored to present action; FAIL if the span remains primarily external choreography.
findings.problem: A long exteriority run turns the chapter into staged logistics: from errands through takeout, the focalizer mostly reports action/dialogue without interior thought/sensation until later, causing screenplay drift.
findings.rewrite_direction: Add short interior beats tied to immediate stimuli during the errands sequence, not retrospective summary. Insert at least two interior moments in `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:125`-`snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:171` and one in `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:181`-`snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:189`.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if only one of those three loci retains the explicit saint-versus-liar framing and the other two are rewritten as concrete child-context questions (homework/church/bus-ride level, not abstract moral thesis); FAIL if all three still echo the same binary framing.
findings.problem: Leo's dialogue repeats the saint/liar thematic binary in multiple exchanges, making him read as a thesis-delivery device more than an eight-year-old with variable conversational focus.
findings.rewrite_direction: Keep one direct saint/liar question, but diversify the other beats into child-specific, situational questions with imperfect logic and abrupt pivots. Rework at least two of `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:93`, `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:155`, and `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:195`.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if, in `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:239-244`, Carina has at least one full boundary statement delivered while physically still, and if no more than one adjacent dialogue beat in that span is coupled to a chore action; FAIL if boundary talk remains fully chore-coupled.
findings.problem: Carina's stress tell (task-listing and visible multitasking) is applied so continuously that voice calibration becomes mechanical rather than dynamic, flattening her emotional contour.
findings.rewrite_direction: Reduce repeated chore-tag scaffolding and add one stillness beat where Carina delivers boundary language without doing another task. Focus revisions in `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:59`, `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:113`, `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:167`, and especially `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:239`-`snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:244`.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:115` equivalent contains complete clauses with explicit subject+verb for each step; FAIL if the line remains a sequence of verbless fragment commands.
findings.problem: Telegraphic noun-phrase clipping in spoken lines ("Laundromat drop. Dollar Plus for poster board. Pharmacy for Mami's knee refill.") violates the constitution's anti-elliptical-clipping rule and reads as stylized shorthand over natural speech.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rewrite the mission-list line into grammatically complete spoken clauses while preserving Carina's pace and command tone. Target `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:115`.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if, across those target loci, no more than two "looked" interpersonal beats remain and replaced beats convey tension through non-gaze action/sound/tactile detail; FAIL if the same gaze formula still appears at three or more loci.
findings.problem: The chapter reuses gaze-stage-direction construction ("looked at") more than twice, which flattens relational beats into generic visual blocking.
findings.rewrite_direction: Replace at least three gaze-default beats with more specific physical or auditory relational cues. Prioritize `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:95`, `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:143`, `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:207`, `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:380`, and `snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:420`.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: When choosing between reputationally safe abstraction and specific discomfort, choose specificity. Render addiction, sexuality, deceit, class shame, and grief at lived scale. In edge cases, preserve character truth and causal accountability over reader comfort or institutional decorum.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene demands bodily, moral, or economic specificity, euphemistic phrasing is treated as a failed draft and must be rewritten with concrete stakes and observable consequence.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high - contractions are the spoken default; full forms appear only for emphasis, ritual language, or character-specific formal posture

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate scene density and pressure modes: pair high-conflict chapters with quiet domestic or documentary chapters, vary dialogue-to-interiority ratios, and prevent identical chapter skeletons in consecutive sequence.
prose_style_profile.diction: contemporary literary diction with class-aware, borough-specific concreteness; avoid prestige-neutral workshop language
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third centered on Marisol, with rare brief distance expansions for institutional scenes
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: alternating tensile compression and reflective extension; line-level cadence should carry emotional pressure, not just information
